warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
10 Leg Raise holding rig
Wrist Mobilisation
10 toe walks
10 heel walks
10x Ankle Rocks
gymnastics:
Ring Dip Progression
EMOM x4 - 30 Second Hold to Support - Rings or Parrallete (00:00)
EMOM x 4 Bench Dips x 10 (04:00)
EMOM x 4 Banded Dips (08:00)
EMOM x 4 Strict Dips (12:00)
EMOM x 4 Kipping Dip Practice (16:00-20:00)
Pistol Squat Progression
EMOM x 10 mins (20:00)
Odd Minutes
5 Box Pistols (slow and controlled)
Even MInutes
20 Second Pistol Holds (each leg)
OR Gymnastics squat hold
EMOM x 5 (30:00)
5 Eccentric Lower
Two Leg stand Up
EMOM x 5 (35:00)
Counterbalance Pistols - Small Plate

hypertrophy.reasoning: Chest and triceps are heavily taxed by dip progressions; quads/glutes fatigued by pistol work. Build antagonists.
